summary: Comprehensive testing of Verityn enterprise-grade news app. All core features are working correctly: category selection (no white rectangle), news loading after onboarding, category tab filtering, and retry functionality. Backend API passes all 8 tests. The app successfully implements enterprise-grade services (NewsService, NetworkManager, OfflineNewsCache) with proper error handling.

minor.issue: Some news sources (NYTimes, WashingtonPost) block image scraping - 403 errors. Expected behavior, handled with placeholders.

critical_code_review_comments: Enterprise-grade services (NewsService, NetworkManager, OfflineNewsCache, useNews hook) are well-implemented with proper retry logic, caching, and error handling
Category selection UI is clean with proper visual feedback (colored borders, checkmarks, text color changes)
data-testid attributes present on key elements but may need testID for React Native Web compatibility
seed_data_creation: None - RSS feeds provide real-time news data
context_for_next_testing_agent: All core features verified working: GDPR consent flow, category selection (no white rectangle), news loading, category tab filtering, and error states with retry. Bookmark and Share buttons are visible and accessible. Pull-to-refresh works on mobile. The enterprise-grade services (NetworkManager, NewsService, OfflineNewsCache) are properly implemented.

verified_features.gdpr_consent: Working - Accept All & Continue button navigates to category selection
verified_features.category_selection: Working - Clean UI, no white rectangle, colored borders on selection, checkmarks visible, 'X of 7 selected' counter working
verified_features.get_started_navigation: Working - Navigates to home screen after category selection
verified_features.news_loading: Working - API returns articles correctly, displayed with images, source, category tag, read time, time ago
verified_features.category_tab_filtering: Working - My Feed, Business, Politics, Technology tabs filter articles correctly
verified_features.retry_button: Working - 'Try Again' button appears in empty/error states
verified_features.bookmark_button: Visible and accessible in article card overlay
verified_features.share_button: Visible and accessible in article card overlay
verified_features.bottom_navigation: Working - Home, For You, Search, Saved, Settings tabs functional
